subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou hast exalted Thyself through Thy Most Great Manifestation evident in the horizon of Thy verses and Thou hast glorified Thy being through the Beauty of Thy most gracious Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی تعالیت بظهورک الاعظم فی آفاق ایاتک و تعززت بجمال اسمک الاکرم فی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for assistance; intercession
